description: This file contains Sass mixins for form validation styling, including state selectors, feedback messages, tooltips, and input styling, designed to be compatible with Dart Sass.

methods.name: form-validation-state-selector
methods.description: A mixin that applies styles based on the validation state, such as 'valid' or 'invalid', affecting feedback and tooltip display.

methods.name: form-validation-state
methods.description: A mixin that styles form feedback, tooltips, and input borders based on validation state, color, icon, and other visual parameters.
